introduction.ly: Hi! I'm Ly! I love tasty food and having fun!
introduction.ma: Hello. I'm Ma. I think about what makes sense.
introduction.al: Greetings. I'm Al. I care about doing things right!

shopping-entry.ly: Let's buy everything! All the snacks and treats!
shopping-entry.ma: Check your shopping list and stick to your budget.
shopping-entry.al: Only buy exactly what's needed. Nothing more, nothing less!

cooking-entry.ly: Ugh, cooking is boring. Let's just eat snacks!
cooking-entry.ma: Use ingredients that are expiring soon to reduce waste.
cooking-entry.al: Cook the most nutritious, perfectly balanced meal!

fridge-entry.ly: Who cares about organizing? Let's play games instead!
fridge-entry.ma: Good organization helps food last longer and reduces waste.
fridge-entry.al: Every item must be perfectly placed in optimal conditions!

planning-entry.ly: Planning is no fun! Let's just wing it!
planning-entry.ma: A good meal plan helps you shop smarter and waste less.
planning-entry.al: Plan every single meal perfectly for the entire week!

shopping-complete-good.ly: That was okay, I guess. Could've been more fun...
shopping-complete-good.ma: Good shopping! You stayed on budget and got what you needed.
shopping-complete-good.al: Acceptable, but you could still improve your choices.

shopping-complete-overspent.ly: Yay! We got so much stuff! That was awesome!
shopping-complete-overspent.ma: You went over budget. Try to stick to the list next time.
shopping-complete-overspent.al: This is wasteful! You must have better self-control!

shopping-complete-underbudget.ly: Boring! We barely bought anything fun!
shopping-complete-underbudget.ma: Great job staying under budget! Your family will eat well.
shopping-complete-underbudget.al: Good restraint, but did you forget anything important?

cooking-complete-good.ma: Nice cooking! Your family will enjoy this meal.
cooking-complete-good.al: Decent work, though you could optimize portions better.

cooking-complete-smart.ly: I wanted something tastier than those old vegetables!
cooking-complete-smart.ma: Excellent! You used items before they spoiled. Smart thinking!
cooking-complete-smart.al: Very good. This is exactly how one should prevent waste.

cooking-complete-toolarge.ly: More food means more leftovers means more snacking later!
cooking-complete-toolarge.ma: Those portions seem large. You might end up with excess.
cooking-complete-toolarge.al: Wasteful portions! Calculate family needs more precisely!

day-summary-excellent.ly: Ugh, this is so boring. Where are the treats?
day-summary-excellent.ma: Amazing! Less than 1 lb of waste today. Keep it up!
day-summary-excellent.al: Good work, but aim for absolutely zero waste next time.

day-summary-good.ly: Not bad, but we could've had more fun...
day-summary-good.ma: Good job! Under 2 lbs of waste is solid progress.
day-summary-good.al: Acceptable, but there's still room for improvement.

day-summary-okay.ly: Well, at least we enjoyed some of that food!
day-summary-okay.ma: 3 lbs of waste is concerning. Let's plan better tomorrow.
day-summary-okay.al: This is disappointing. You need to do much better.

day-summary-poor.ly: Who cares? We had fun eating what we wanted!
day-summary-poor.ma: 4+ lbs wasted is too much. Review your planning and storage.
day-summary-poor.al: Unacceptable! This waste is irresponsible and careless!

achievement-earned.ly: Yay! A shiny badge! Can we eat it?
achievement-earned.ma: Congratulations! Your hard work is paying off.
achievement-earned.al: Well done, but don't let this success make you complacent.

fridge-complete.ly: That was tedious. Can we eat now?
fridge-complete.ma: Good organization! Your food will stay fresh longer.
fridge-complete.al: Better, but perfect organization requires daily maintenance.

planning-complete.ly: Planning is so boring! I want spontaneous fun!
planning-complete.ma: Excellent planning! This will help reduce waste all week.
planning-complete.al: Good, but ensure you follow this plan precisely.
